1954-2339  style                     \n\t.some_class {\n\t\tcolor: red;\n\t}\n\n\t.hypen-class {\n\t\tfont-size: 16px;\n\t}\n\n\tp {\n\t\tbox-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);\n\t}\n\n\t/* comment */\n\n\t/*\n\tmulti\n\tline\n\n\t<comment>\n\n\t*/\n\n\t#unique_id {\n\t\tbackground-color: blue;\n\t}\n\n\t@media (max-width: 600px) {\n\t\t:global(body) {\n\t\t\tbackground-color: light-dark(lightblue, darkblue);\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t:global(.escapehatch)::before {\n\t\tcontent: '< & >';\n\t}\n
